LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS OFF CALENDAR PER THE WITHDRAWAL OF MOTION FILED ON FEBRUARY 18, 2014. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES, JEFFREY ALAN $16,419.78 PRINCIPAL, $2,999.32 INTEREST, $525.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,944.10, INTEREST AT 10% PERCENT PER ANNUM FROM AUGUST 31, 2012 TO JUNE 30. 2014.
